item.title: Refresh Convex plugin: rename to `convex`, bump SHA to v1.0.1, richer metadata (#1980)
item.description: * Refresh Convex plugin: rename to `convex`, bump SHA to v1.0.1, richer metadata Picked up from sethconvex's PR #1966 (auto-closed by membership gate). Original entry added by Tobin in PR #1918 (2026-05-18). Changes to the Convex marketplace.json entry: - **Rename slug** `convex-backend` → `conve

item.title: Merge pull request #2055 from anthropics/fix-windows-agentic-reviewer
item.description: security-guidance: enable agentic commit reviewer on Windows

item.title: Address Windows verification: --prefer-binary + pywin32 bootstrap
item.description: The first round of this PR removed SKIP_WIN32, fixed venv_py to use Scripts/python.exe, and added Lib/site-packages to the consumer glob — all necessary. Windows verification (Win11 ARM64, Py 3.13, Git Bash) showed two more blockers, both addressed here. 1. Pip dependency resolver picks unbuildable

item.title: Enable agentic commit reviewer on Windows
item.description: The agentic reviewer is silently no-op on Windows today. SessionStart bootstrap (ensure_agent_sdk.py) short-circuits with SKIP_WIN32 because the consumer glob in llm.py only matches POSIX venv layout (lib/pythonX.Y/site-packages). On Windows, venvs use Lib/site-packages (capital L, no pythonX.Y subd

item.title: Merge pull request #2054 from anthropics/fix-2043-windows-posix-path
item.description: security-guidance: convert POSIX script paths to Windows form on Git Bash

item.title: Convert POSIX script paths to Windows form before exec on Git Bash
item.description: Fixes #2043. On Git Bash for Windows, Claude Code hands script paths to the shim in POSIX form (`/c/Users/...`). We exec a Windows `python.exe` (the `python3` Microsoft Store stub fails the probe), and Windows Python interprets the leading `/` as the root of the current drive — `/c/...` becomes `C:\

item.title: ci: validate Apache 2.0 LICENSE file exists in every plugin (#2028)
item.description: Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

item.title: Bump carta-* SHA pins (3 plugins) to upstream HEAD (#2052)
Merge pull request #2041 from anthropics/security-guidance-update
item.description: Update security-guidance plugin

item.title: Update security-guidance plugin
ci: migrate scan-plugins.yml to Workload Identity Federation auth (#1991)
item.description: * ci: migrate scan-plugins.yml to Workload Identity Federation auth Replaces the static ANTHROPIC_API_KEY repo secret with Workload Identity Federation: the scan-plugins shared action mints a GitHub OIDC token (id-token: write) and the claude CLI exchanges it for a short-lived bearer. The federatio

item.title: fix(UI5): Rename GitHub repository and bump SHAs (#1976)
item.description: Updates ui5 and ui5-typescript-conversion to the renamed upstream repo UI5/plugins-coding-agents (formerly UI5/plugins-claude) and bumps both SHA pins to current upstream main. Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

item.title: Fix MCP URL probe: connection failure was reported as PASS (#1922)
item.description: curl writes "000" to -w '%{http_code}' on a connection failure AND exits nonzero. The previous fallback put the echo inside the command substitution — both wrote, the captured value was "000000", and the case statement's 000) arm didn't match, so dead hosts fell through to PASS. Move the fallback as

item.title: Merge pull request #1953 from anthropics/add-plugin/mcp-tunnels
item.description: Add mcp-tunnels plugin

item.title: Rename mcp-gateway -> mcp-proxy throughout
item.description: Aligns the compose service name, local config filename, and all log/restart commands with the image and binary name. Adds an explicit -config arg since the image CMD still defaults to the legacy /etc/mcp-gateway path. :house: Remote-Dev: homespace

item.title: Link to public MCP tunnels docs and use public mcp-proxy image
item.description: - Replace doc references with platform.claude.com URLs (overview, quickstart, security, deploy-compose, deploy-helm, console, troubleshooting, reference, WIF) - Swap the POC mcp-proxy image for the public registry digest used in the published quickstart :house: Remote-Dev: homespace

item.title: Add mcp-tunnels plugin
item.description: Adds the /create-docker-mcp-tunnel command, which drives the MCP tunnels Docker Compose quickstart end to end: preflight checks, certificate generation, proxy config, cloudflared, an optional sample FastMCP server, and verification from Managed Agents and the Messages API. Migrated from anthropic-e

item.title: Merge pull request #1935 from anthropics/fix/quote-claude-plugin-root-paths
item.description: fix: quote ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} in hookify and security-guidance hook commands

item.title: fix: quote \${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} in hookify and security-guidance hook commands
item.description: Paths containing spaces (common on Windows, e.g. C:\Users\Some User\...) cause shell word-splitting when CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is unquoted, resulting in hooks erroring with "No such file or directory" on every tool call. Wraps the path in double quotes for all five affected hook commands. Fixes the pa

item.title: Bump snowflake-cortex-code to v3.1.0 (#1932)
Add 24 first-party plugins from major-brand orgs (#1919)
item.description: Promote first-party plugins from recognizable companies that publish deep, actively-maintained Claude Code plugins from their official GitHub orgs. All entries are SHA-pinned to current default-branch HEAD. Development: - apollo-skills (Apollo GraphQL): 14 GraphQL skills + Apollo MCP server - appwr

item.title: Bump 25 plugin SHA pins to upstream HEAD (huggingface–railway) (#1914)
item.description: * Bump 26 plugin SHA pins to upstream HEAD * Revert mercadopago SHA bump The new upstream SHA adds a PreToolUse hook that fires on every Bash/Edit/Write/Read in all sessions and globally blocks reading .env files, regardless of project relevance. The policy scan flags this as out of scope for what

item.title: Add carta-crm and carta-investors plugins (#1877)
Add convex-backend plugin (#1918)
Fix broken plugin source configs and bump their SHAs (#1915)
item.description: * Fix broken plugin source configs and bump their SHAs Several external plugins had source configs that no longer matched the upstream layout, so the automated SHA bump skipped them indefinitely. Add the missing path field where the manifest moved into a subdirectory, correct stale ref/commit metad

item.title: Raise bump cap with verdict cache and skip-and-revert (#1913)
item.description: * Cache scan verdicts and drop policy-failing entries from bump PRs Three changes that together let the nightly bump clear any backlog in a single run without blocking on a single bad upstream or re-burning Claude time on already-scanned SHAs: - bump-plugin-shas.yml: raise max-bumps default 20 ->

item.title: Bump 21 plugin SHA pins to upstream HEAD (#1911)
Bump 27 plugin SHA pins to upstream HEAD (#1912)
Run plugin SHA bump nightly instead of weekly (#1909)
item.description: Upstream plugins move daily; a weekly sweep with a 20-bump cap can fall behind. Each run force-resets the bump branch, so stale unmerged PRs are replaced rather than piling up.

item.title: Add CI check for HTTP MCP server URL liveness (#1910)
item.description: Walks marketplace.json for vendored plugins, extracts http/sse MCP server URLs from .mcp.json / mcp.json / plugin.json, and probes each with HEAD then a JSON-RPC POST fallback. Fails on 404/410 and connection errors; passes on auth/method errors (expected without credentials). Runs on PR, daily sche

item.title: Add save-to-spotify plugin (#1905)
Add zoominfo plugin (#1885)
Bump crowdstrike-falcon-foundry SHA to v1.0.0 (#1842)
item.description: Pins to the v1.0.0 tag (a6a500c) instead of pre-release HEAD (e7fa026).

item.title: Add carta-cap-table plugin (#1876)
Bump pagerduty plugin to latest upstream SHA (#1862)
item.description: Picks up v1.1.0: new /create-pagerduty-skill command (Early Access).

item.title: Bump vanta-mcp-plugin SHA to 345d86b5 (#1843)
Bump box plugin SHA and enumerate skills (#1845)
chore: modify data-agent-kit-starter-pack plugin details (#1826)
item.description: * chore: modify data-agent-kit-starter-pack plugin details Updated the description and homepage of the data-agent-kit-starter-pack plugin, and changed the SHA. * update sha for latest commit

item.title: Fix servicenow-sdk ref: ServiceNow/sdk uses master, not main (#1830)
item.description: The ServiceNow/sdk repository's default branch is 'master' and there is no 'main' branch. The pinned SHA (06adf37) is the current head of 'master'. Update the ref so future SHA bumps target the correct branch.

item.title: Merge pull request #1820 from anthropics/morganl/code-modernization-plugin
item.description: code-modernization: fix pipeline gaps, redesign harden, dry-run hardening

item.title: code-modernization: harden writes a patch instead of editing legacy; make map/security guidance language-agnostic
item.description: - modernize-harden: never edits legacy/ anymore. Writes findings plus a reviewed unified diff to analysis/<system>/security_remediation.patch. A second security-auditor pass reviews each hunk (RESOLVES / PARTIAL / INTRODUCES-RISK) before presenting. The user reviews and applies the patch del

item.title: Harden code-modernization plugin from a real CardDemo dry run
item.description: Fixes found by running the discovery workflow against the AWS CardDemo mainframe sample (~50 KLOC of COBOL/CICS/JCL/BMS/VSAM): - modernize-assess: add scc -> cloc -> find/wc fallback chain with the COCOMO-II formula so Step 1 works when scc isn't installed; same for portfolio-mode cloc/lizard.

item.title: Fix code-modernization plugin: align README with commands, fix pipeline gaps
item.description: - modernize-brief: read TOPOLOGY.html (what modernize-map actually produces) instead of nonexistent TOPOLOGY.md, and tell the user which command produces each missing input. - README: rewrite the Commands section to match actual command behavior — correct output filenames, ordering (brief is t

item.title: Make Scan Plugins a viable required check; auto-dispatch on bump PRs (#1815)
item.description: Scan Plugins is meant to gate every change to marketplace.json, but two gaps made that unenforceable: 1. The bump workflow opens PRs with GITHUB_TOKEN, which GitHub exempts from on:pull_request triggers. Weekly bump PRs (e.g. #1809) get no scan check at all. 2. The workflow had a paths filter

item.title: Add airtable plugin (#1817)
item.description: Adds the airtable marketplace entry. Sourced from Airtable/skills at plugins/airtable, pinned to aaeb4f3e (latest main, tag 2026-05-06). Bundles the official Airtable MCP server (mcp.airtable.com/mcp) plus skills for the Airtable data model and filter syntax. https://claude.ai/code/session_01Vom6Rz

item.title: Bump bump-plugin-shas action so bump commits are signed (#1814)
item.description: The pinned version of anthropics/claude-plugins-community's bump-plugin-shas action creates the bump commit with a local git commit, which is unsigned and unmergeable under the required_signatures ruleset on main. The new SHA creates the commit via the GraphQL createCommitOnBranch mutation, which Gi

item.title: Add mercadopago plugin (#1813)
item.description: Mercado Pago full-product integration toolkit — 13 skills, agents, and a bundled MCP for live API data. Sourced from mercadopago/mercadopago-claude-marketplace at plugins/mercadopago, pinned to 1de8d97e. Closes #1272 https://claude.ai/code/session_01XCupEyAPLqxo2eHgVoWevi Co-authored-by: Claude <

item.title: Add sap-cds-mcp plugin + SAP SE author block on cds-mcp (#1778)
item.description: CAP CDS work as one cohesive unit, split out of #1616 to keep that PR narrowly scoped to sap-hana-cli (which is currently held on an upstream plugin.json fix). - Adds new sap-cds-mcp entry alongside existing cds-mcp (additive, non-breaking — both point to cap-js/mcp-server). Pinned at 8ce2e13a. -

item.title: Align SAP author blocks on existing entries (#1779)
item.description: Metadata-only refresh per the SAP namespace policy (Florian/Klaus/Avital, 2026-05-04). No slug renames, no new entries. - sap-mdk-server: expand author from {"name":"SAP"} to the unified SAP SE block with ospo@sap.com. - ui5: add unified UI5 author block (openui5@sap.com per Florian's carve-out

item.title: Add sap-fiori-mcp-server plugin (#1777)
item.description: MCP server for SAP Fiori development tools — build and modify SAP Fiori applications with AI assistance. Pinned at d9d4ab7e (latest main of SAP/open-ux-tools).
